title: Pumpkins Accelerated
description: Adds new variations to carved pumpkins, and adds soul jack-o-lanterns as well! Try using these new pumpkins on snow golems to make them more expressive.
body:
## Pumpkins Accelerated
Adds 9 new carve patterns to the pumpkin, as well as soul jack-o-lanterns. Different variations can be cycled through using shears. The different variations can then be used to create snow golems with more expressive faces! 
- Right click with shears on a jack-o-lantern to go forward by one design
- Left click with shears to go backward by one design
- Wear new pumpkins on your head
- Soul Jack-O-Lanterns are crafted like normal jack-o-lanterns, but with soul torches
Supports Optifabric and Sodium.
